properties.text: Reentrancy guard must prevent re-entry during bid callback execution.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset, amount, data): s_entered == true during callback => re-entry reverts

properties.text: Flash-loan pattern: asset transferred to bidder before assetOut pulled from bidder.
properties.assertion: forall bid(): transfer(asset, bidder) happens-before transferFrom(bidder, assetOut)

properties.text: Bid callback must not allow state manipulation that reduces assetOut payment amount.
properties.assertion: forall bid(data != empty): assetOutAmount is fixed before callback, transferFrom uses same value

properties.text: Bid must revert if auction is not live (auctionStart == 0 or duration elapsed).
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset): auctionStart == 0 OR elapsed > duration => revert InvalidAuction

properties.text: Bid amount must not exceed contract's available balance of the auctioned asset.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset, amount): amount <= balanceOf(address(this), asset)

properties.text: Bid USD value must meet minimum threshold (minBidUsdValue).
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset, amount): bidUsdValue(amount, price) >= s_minBidUsdValue

properties.text: Price multiplier decreases linearly from startingPM to endingPM over auction duration.
properties.assertion: forall t in [0, duration]: pm(t) == startPM - (startPM - endPM) * t / duration

properties.text: Elapsed time clamped to auctionDuration prevents extra price decay past auction end.
properties.assertion: forall getAssetOutAmount(elapsed): effective_elapsed = min(elapsed, auctionDuration)

properties.text: AssetOut amount rounding via mulDivUp/mulWadUp must favor protocol (bidder pays more).
properties.assertion: forall getAssetOutAmount(): roundUp(auctionUsdValue * assetOutDecimals / price) >= exact_value

properties.text: startingPriceMultiplier >= endingPriceMultiplier >= i_minPriceMultiplier must hold.
properties.assertion: forall assetParams: startingPM >= endingPM >= i_minPriceMultiplier

properties.text: performUpkeep must revert if starting auction for asset with existing live auction.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep(eligible): s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0 => revert LiveAuction

properties.text: Auction start sets s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp exactly.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep(start): post(s_auctionStarts[asset]) == block.timestamp

properties.text: Auction end deletes s_auctionStarts[asset] and returns remaining asset to feeAggregator.
properties.assertion: forall onAuctionEnd(asset): post(s_auctionStarts[asset]) == 0 AND remainingBalance transferred

properties.text: Accumulated assetOut from bids must be forwarded to assetOutReceiver on auction end.
properties.assertion: forall onAuctionEnd(): assetOutBal > 0 => transfer(assetOut, assetOutReceiver, assetOutBal)

properties.text: checkUpkeep clears eligible assets when assetOut price is invalid (no auctions with bad price).
properties.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(): !isAssetOutPriceValid => eligibleAssetsIdx == 0

properties.text: Only assets with valid price, no live auction, and balance >= minAuctionSizeUsd are eligible.
properties.assertion: forall eligible(asset): isPriceValid AND auctionStart == 0 AND usdValue >= minAuctionSizeUsd

properties.text: Auction ends if duration elapsed OR remaining balance USD below minAuctionSizeUsd.
properties.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(asset): ended iff (elapsed > duration OR (valid AND balUsd < minAuctionSizeUsd))

properties.text: transmit() must reject stale reports (observationsTimestamp < block.timestamp - staleness).
properties.assertion: forall transmit(report): report.observationsTimestamp >= block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold

properties.text: Price must be scaled to exactly 18 decimals before storage regardless of feed decimals.
properties.assertion: forall transmit(report): stored_price == raw_price * 10^(18 - feedDecimals) when feedDecimals < 18

properties.text: Zero price after decimal scaling must revert (prevents zero-cost asset acquisition).
properties.assertion: forall transmit(report): scaled_usdPrice == 0 => revert ZeroFeedData

properties.text: Data Streams price prioritized over Data Feed; fallback only when streams stale and feed configured.
properties.assertion: forall getAssetPrice(): use_feed iff streamsUpdatedAt < minTimestamp AND usdDataFeed != 0

properties.text: When both prices stale, most recent timestamp wins between Data Streams and Data Feed.
properties.assertion: forall getAssetPrice(): use_feed iff dataFeedUpdatedAt > streamsUpdatedAt

properties.text: Negative data feed answer must revert via SafeCast.toUint256 (no negative prices).
properties.assertion: forall getAssetPrice(feed): answer < 0 => revert SafeCast overflow

properties.text: Feed ID rotation must preserve price source for previous asset via usdDataFeed fallback.
properties.assertion: forall applyFeedInfoUpdates(rotate): prevAsset != newAsset => prevAsset.usdDataFeed != 0

properties.text: Each dataStreamsFeedId must map to exactly one asset (no feed ID collision).
properties.assertion: forall feedId: |{a : feedIdToAsset[feedId] == a}| <= 1

properties.text: Cannot modify asset params while a live auction exists for that asset.
properties.assertion: forall applyAssetParamsUpdates(asset): s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0 => revert LiveAuction

properties.text: Bidders are untrusted: all bid inputs (asset, amount, data) are attacker-controlled.
properties.assertion: forall bid(asset, amount, data): inputs are externally controlled, no trust assumed

properties.text: Price feed data is semi-trusted: staleness and manipulation within PriceManager is in scope.
properties.assertion: forall transmit(): feed data verified externally, but staleness/zero checks are local responsibility

properties.text: Automation forwarder is trusted: performUpkeep caller authorization is out of scope.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep(): caller has automation role, not attacker-reachable

properties.text: Funds pulled from feeAggregator before auction starts (no bidding on unfunded auctions).
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep(start): transferForSwap() executes before s_auctionStarts[asset] = timestamp

properties.text: performUpkeep reverts if eligible asset balance below minAuctionSizeUsd (no dust auctions).
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep(eligible): availableUsdValue < minAuctionSizeUsd => revert

properties.text: If eligible asset is assetOut itself, transfer full balance to assetOutReceiver (no auction).
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep(asset == assetOut): transfer(fullBalance, assetOutReceiver), no auctionStart set

properties.text: All feed IDs must be allowlisted before bulk verification in transmit().
properties.assertion: forall transmit(reports): forall r in reports: feedIdToAsset[r.feedId] != address(0)

properties.text: getAssetOutAmount view returns 0 for invalid auctions instead of reverting (view-safe).
properties.assertion: forall getAssetOutAmount_view(invalid): return 0, no revert

properties.text: View getAssetOutAmount caps input amount to available balance (no phantom liquidity).
properties.assertion: forall getAssetOutAmount_view(amount): effective = min(amount, balanceOf(asset))

properties.text: setAssetOut deletes old assetOut params preventing stale config from persisting.
properties.assertion: forall setAssetOut(new): post(s_assetParams[old]) == deleted

properties.text: Config setters (setAssetOut, setAssetOutReceiver, setFeeAggregator) require no live auctions.
properties.assertion: forall configSetter(): exists liveAuction => revert

properties.text: Only Data Streams report version 3 accepted; other versions revert.
properties.assertion: forall applyFeedInfoUpdates(add): feedId != 0 => version == 3

properties.text: At least one price source (dataStreamsFeedId or usdDataFeed) required per asset.
properties.assertion: forall applyFeedInfoUpdates(add): feedId == 0 AND dataFeed == 0 => revert

properties.text: checkUpkeep gas must be bounded: iteration over s_allowlistedAssets must not exceed block gas.
properties.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(): gasUsed <= blockGasLimit for all allowlisted asset counts

properties.text: Price decay must be monotonically non-increasing over auction duration.
properties.assertion: forall t1 < t2 <= duration: priceMultiplier(t1) >= priceMultiplier(t2)

properties.text: Bid settlement must transfer exact computed assetOut amount (no truncation or rounding down).
properties.assertion: forall bid(): transferFrom(bidder, this, assetOutAmount) where assetOutAmount == _getAssetOutAmount()

properties.text: Auction end via performUpkeep must only process assets with non-zero auctionStart.
properties.assertion: forall performUpkeep(ended): s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0 => valid; == 0 => revert InvalidAuction

properties.text: int192 to uint256 cast for price must revert on negative values (SafeCast protection).
properties.assertion: forall transmit(report): report.price < 0 => revert SafeCast

properties.text: Decimal scaling precision loss: price / 10^(feedDecimals-18) must not truncate to zero for small prices.
properties.assertion: forall transmit(feedDecimals > 18): price / 10^(feedDecimals-18) == 0 => revert ZeroFeedData

properties.text: stalenessThreshold must be non-zero to prevent all prices being considered stale.
properties.assertion: forall applyFeedInfoUpdates(add): stalenessThreshold > 0
